step.title: Load PRD
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/prd.md and extract functional requirements and acceptance criteria.
If product-brief exists, load it for additional user context.

step.title: Map user flows
step.action: Design user flows for each key feature, mapping the user journey from entry to completion.

step.title: Design wireframes
step.action: Create text-based wireframe descriptions for each screen in the user flows.

step.title: Define interaction patterns
step.action: Specify interaction patterns: navigation, form handling, feedback, error states, loading states.

step.title: Document responsive and accessibility notes
step.action: Document responsive behavior across breakpoints and initial accessibility considerations.

step.title: Produce UX spec
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with UX design details.
